rationale: The proposed change is a statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b), not a state agency rule. Even if an implementing rule were adopted, §2001.0045(c)(9) exempts rules necessary to implement legislation.
quote: (9) is necessary to implement legislation, unless the legislature specifically states this section applies to the rule.
_note: No conflict. §2001.0045 governs state agency rulemaking, not legislative amendments to the Tax Code.
